hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; names=""; for f in docs/code-brief-*.md; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; names="$names${names:+, }$(basename "$f")"; done; [ -n "$names" ] || exit 0; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"New Cowork brief(s) waiting in docs/ (not yet moved to docs/DONE/): %s. Per the Cowork brief workflow, verify signatures against the live repo before implementing."}}\n' "$names"

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; names=""; for f in docs/code-brief-*.md; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; names="$names${names:+, }$(basename "$f")"; done; [ -n "$names" ] || exit 0; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"New Cowork brief(s) waiting in docs/ (not yet moved to docs/DONE/): %s. Per the Cowork brief workflow, verify signatures against the live repo before implementing."}}\n' "$names"
